productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Core 50 Black Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those fitness freaks, the adidas Core 50 trainer is great buy for it combines style and comfort at its best.UpperSynthetic leather upper for durability, style and comfortStrategically placed synthetic and twill overlays for added shoe structureadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMeshed and cushioned inner for absolute breathable comfortMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitErgonomically curved and padded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionOutsoleNon-marking rubber outsole for enhanced durabilityErgonomically designed lugs with grooves for ease of movement, grip and tractionPivot point on big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement of the footShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
